title: Review: reject empty contact_id and non-string role in member patches
description: Deep pre-merge review of commits ecb97a8, c8bf9c7, 8325e58 covering space_set atomicity, member patch validation, and Android pendingPermissionResult fix.
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Three P0 correctness bugs remain in contact_set/contact_query (not touched by these commits). The reviewed commits themselves (space_set atomicity, member patch validation, Android pendingPermissionResult) are solid. No security surface exposures in the new code.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: did not read message_set, space_invite_set, or the full store — they may have the same rows_affected pattern as set_contact_display_name. Would raise confidence if: grep rows_affected across all store write methods that return Ok(()) to confirm whether the pattern repeats.
